title: anisomeles vulpina
intro: Anisomeles vulpina is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the 'Yellow Chameleon'. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Anisomeles vulpina include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Anisomeles vulpina is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, and is also employed in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being and health.
